title: Gymnostachyum signatum
taxonomy: Gymnostachyum signatum is classified within the family Acanthaceae. It belongs to the genus Gymnostachyum. The species signatum is a member of the plant kingdom and is further classified as a flowering plant. Gymnostachyum signatum is native to certain regions in Asia. This classification helps in understanding its evolutionary history and relationships with other plant species.
